name: Kindergarten Environmental Stewardship — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place through a close look at living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place.

lessons.title: Try it together: living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place through a guided practice with living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place through a small creation or demonstration about living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place.

units.title: Wonder and notice: living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at living things, litter, reuse, and caring for a shared place, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.
